title: 3 X CARTRIDGES HARD AS NAILS INTERIOR NO MORE NAILS SOLVENT FREE ADHESIVE
features: 3 x Hard As Nails High power adhesive Solvent free.
151 hard as nails is a solvent free, instant grab high strength adhesive which eliminates the need for nails and screws in many DIY jobs.
It is ideal for fixing skirting boards, dado rails, architraves, plasterboard, plaster and polystyrene coving, carpet and grippers etc. to most building materials, as long as one surface is porous.
This ultra high power adhesive is suitable for uneven surfaces because it fills minor gaps.

This is ideal for use in the home as it dries white and can easily be painted when dry. Solvent free, this ultra high power adhesive will replace the need for nails and screws and can be used to bond wood, plastic, brick, glass, ceramics and more.
description: Hard as Nails 3 Tubes High power adhesive Solvent free No Need for Nails 151 hard as nails is a solvent free, instant grab high strength adhesive which eliminates the need for nails and screws in many DIY jobs. It is ideal for fixing skirting boards, dado rails, architraves, plasterboard, plaster and polystyrene coving, carpet and grippers etc. to most building materials, as long as one surface is porous. This ultra high power adhesive is suitable for uneven surfaces because it fills minor gaps. This is ideal for use in the home as it dries white and can easily be painted when dry. Solvent free, this ultra high power adhesive will replace the need for nails and screws and can be used to bond wood, plastic, brick, glass, ceramics and more. 280ml each.
